reports.description: Information about a condensation funnel appeared on social media in the district, after an hour there was information about damage from two towns. Chaotic damage indicates vortex motion rather than straight-line winds, and a funnel cloud was observed as the supercell thunderstorm passed through. The report about the sinkhole can be found in the comment in the second link
references: https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1MMasWp3XD/
multiple photo and video reports on Facebook via MetFigyelő page
